question: Where is the vase in relation to the flowers? Select from the following options: (A) The flowers are inside the vase. (B) The vase is behind the flowers. (C) The vase is on top of the flowers. (D) The flowers are next to the vase.
gold_answer: The flowers are inside the vase
answer_choices: The flowers are inside the vase
The vase is behind the flowers
The vase is on top of the flowers
The flowers are next to the vase
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
